data.body: COMPLETION EVIDENCE — change has LANDED on main. Gerrit change 942 patch set 2 received both required votes (LLM-Review +1 by the rebar review bot AND Verified +1 by the rebar CI bot) and was submitted; it merged as commit 8e4d6a46d076bd496c797523abfc24b4491722d0, now the HEAD of origin/main (reachable from this worktree's HEAD; carries trailer 'rebar-ticket: 20cc-c59a-ab26-4bc9'). Local gates were green before push and after the registry fix: make lint, make typecheck, and the full make test suite all passed (exit 0); the env-var registry drift gate reproduced clean after regenerating docs/env-vars.md. The prior 'Awaiting ...' comment is superseded: both votes ARE now in and CI is Verified +1. Deliverables: src/rebar/llm/usage_log.py (record/summarize/CLI), the runner _usage-seam call, REBAR_USAGE_LOG + job-summary + JSONL artifact wired into both weekly jobs (external-integration.yml, prompt-eval.yml), docs/env-vars.md registry entry, and tests/unit/test_usage_log.py (9 passing offline tests).
